name: UX & Interaction Design
student_summary: Design apps and websites that feel effortless and human.
overview: Design apps and websites that feel effortless and human. UX & Interaction Design sits in the Product & Design family of Technology & Computing. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You love making new things and expressing original ideas
You draw energy from working closely with people
You notice the small things others miss
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply user research to real problems
Collaborate with your team using wireframing
Keep improving at prototyping — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Studios and creative spaces, with deadline crunches
problem_solving_style: Creative — explore, prototype, iterate on ideas
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: A broad Product & Design foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” UX & Interaction Design is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of wireframing
projects: Beginner: explore user research with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Figma
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Graphic Design & Visual Communication: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Product Management: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Web Development: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does UX & Interaction Design pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹4 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹30 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Art/Design, Psychology. Typical degrees: B.Des Interaction/UX, BFA. Alternatives exist: bootcamps + a strong project portfolio.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like UX & Interaction Design evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
UX & Interaction Design is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
